description: Dashy helps you organize your self-hosted services by making them accessible from a single place
author: BigBearTechWorld

tips.before_install:
NEW APP - DASHY V4

This is a NEW app, separate from 'dashy' (v3). Both can run simultaneously.

FOR NEW USERS:
- Install this app for new Dashy deployments
- v4 stores config at /app/user-data instead of /app/public
- Runs as non-root (uid/gid 1000)

FOR V3 USERS:
- Do NOT uninstall your 'dashy' v3 app
- Deploy this as a NEW app alongside v3
- Copy your conf.yml from v3: docker cp big-bear-dashy:/app/public/conf.yml ./conf.yml
- Note: pageInfo.footerText renamed to pageInfo.footer in v4

Detailed changelog: https://github.com/Lissy93/dashy/blob/master/docs/changelog.md

title: Dashy v4
